Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Denied

WILLIE HILL, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)312-3022, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
TITO A. TORRES, ESQ.(ZANGHI TORRES ARSHAWSKY LLP), (415)977-0444, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT WILLIE HILL'S Motion To Set Aside Judgment IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 (301/PJB/AL)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-24-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Tito Torrres, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation.
Fred Doughty, property manager for Caritas Management Corporation, was placed under oath and testified.
No Appearance by defendant Willie Hill.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial filed March 12, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation and against defendant WILLIE HILL as follows:

Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation shall recover from defendant WILLIE HILL Rent and Per Diem damages in the sum of $990.65, Costs in the amount of 340.00, for a Total Judgment for plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation in the amount of $1,330.65.
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 416A Precita Avenue, #2, San Francisco, CA 94110. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Off Calendar
